embeds.title: Which is your favorite Arc 2 chapter so far?

content: There’s a poll
I’m having a hard time choosing tbh

Chapter 2 for me bc 
- Actually moving the plot 
- Clem special ops while still showing the devastating state of this world 
- William actually has screentime
- More Albino lores
I liked chapter 2 and the trailer’s vibes but the “she actually has a good side” trope was a little old for me. Rest is all good
Like I wanted more horror, more Shaggai, less “there’s actually a nice clementine who is kind and she just wanted to save her family uwu”
oh I read it as not she has a good side but as ||the bug Clem accepts human Clem value about life and will take it into account for her hunting in the future||
as far as we know Clem is still vicious
the 2nd favorite is a tie between 3 and 5
4 falls flat for me <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
and 1 is just really rough (can’t blame them on that tho)
1 is their 20-minute brain scramble after realizing they needed more story

i personally think that chapter 1 probably still has the best average quality of dialogue and character expression mostly because it focused on a very small and confined story compared to the other chapters, doll is also a very engaging character in general and (at least within her chapter 1 appearances) is far better written than say clementine

but honestly chapter 5 is by far the most fun and zesty chapter so it's probably my favorite, even though it would be fair to critique that it's a little bloated, the philosophical discussion is a bit undercooked (for example: treating a theoretical utopia that would eventually be doomed as automatically worse than a maybe-not-doomed shitty reality without expanding on that point at all) as well as the final setpiece fight being kind of... narratively unnecessary? lesbian jazz bar hours and bosnian coffee make up for it
Reya do you have the Nefraea graphic rq
I'm trying to explain ch5 to someone and need a visual but I forgot I didn't have nef PNG saved
oh, also the likes of Kindness and Romance (the others too) are probably the best written supporting characters in a chapter since captain elton... maybe alistair also?
yes, one moment
Memories my goat

i do think the enjoyability factor might be a bit underrated for a lot of people in horror stories, if id voice ""acted"" all of any other arc 2 chapter besides 5 (which i did) it probably would've been a dreadful experience, which to me does say a lot.

||also was pretty funny that almost every character present in chapter 5 ended up being arachne or the keeper of secrets the whole time, so having one voice ""actor"" is accurate in a sense||

ah, additionally before i forget i do want to say that i much preferred the depictions of gore in chapter 5 compared to anything else since arc 1 chapter 7, since they actually had direct narrative purpose and were employed more judiciously, which is more impactful to me than the desensitizing approach of "ooh ooh here's 10 random unnamed npcs exploding into slime and viscera over here" which i feel had become a bit too common in some character stories and parts of the main story as well

real

rube goldberg machine style, small seemingly insignificant actions leading to massive consequences

ah that is more of a subjective taste, im afraid

we're all insects trapped in a piece of static, eternal amber

i think it's also quite dependent on what someone has come to expect both from the wider (arc 2) morimens story and from the chapter's story itself. i wouldn't be surprised if anyone who wanted a serious discussion of fatalism and predeterminism would be disappointed, but this wasn't too grating on me because arachne and nefraea are both very camp characters. probably my favorite scene in the whole chapter is when nefraea mimics and mocks arachne for the ridiculousness of her outlook.
(on another note it's 2am I'm going to eep enjoy theorycrafting)

One of the most underutilized points this entire arc. Is the fact that the keeper is alone.

The allies we get, are Mythag here. We have an artificial body. I want that body alistaired. Going through hell. 

Using the people around us to help. Learning ACTUALLY LYING TO GET INTO PLACES, Becoming A BETTER INVESTIGATOR. Independence.
